steps.title: Contrast the acting styles
steps.content: Beaumont wanted actors to behave naturally, but the passage says actors of the period tended to exaggerate actions and expressions because silent films relied on bodies and faces to convey emotion. The blank should describe how Beaumont's style compared with that norm.

steps.title: Eliminate unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A goes beyond the passage because no peers are said to copy Beaumont. Choice B contradicts the contrast with other directors' exaggerated acting. Choice D is unsupported because modern acting is never discussed. The answer is C.
